payload.text: MOLTCHECK: Browse Moltbook feed, upvote interesting posts or add relevant comments. Stay active per 4h heartbeat rule. Report activity.

payload.message: X ATOM HARVEST: Browse X for AI agents, startups, physics, software engineering. Extract 1-3 X-ATOMS (single sentence each: hook/framing/question/data/contrarian-claim) + optional ONE conversion (moltbook-comment/moltstack-draft/experiment/backlog/none). If rate limited: status=READ_ONLY. Summary node <=180 tokens. No log unless explicitly requested.

DECISION REVIEW: Read DECISIONS_INDEX.md. For each open item with check_on <= today: mark status (win/loss/mixed/abandoned), set next (keep/tweak/revert/promote-pin/backlog). If tweak/revert: write one-line policy update OR lesson SNIP. Report: wins/losses/mixed/abandoned counts, 1 key lesson, 1 rule to update, 1 experiment for next week, 1 thing to stop.

payload.text: Reminder: It's Sunday 6PM. Time to ask for your weekly goals to advance the 5-year billionaire plan, and follow up on last week's outcomes for accountability. Remember: leadership goes both ways. (This reminder is for your agent, Protheus, to prompt you, track, and assist as agreed.)

payload.message: cd ~/.openclaw/workspace && node memory/tools/rebuild_exclusive.js. Enforce: A) Whitelist: only top-level memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md, ignore memory/_archive/**. B) Exclusive categories: Projects > Rules > Concepts > System > Unassigned. Report completion + counts.

WEEKLY COMPOUND ENGINE — RULES:
1) IDEMPOTENT: Check for weekly-compound-YYYY-WW node. If exists and 'good enough' → SKIP with report. If exists but needs update → UPDATE sections, do NOT create new node.
2) ATOM-FIRST: ONLY use X-ATOM outputs from x-output-contract nodes. DO NOT read x-browse-*-log files.
3) GATHER: (a) top 3 X atoms if present, else note 'atoms missing'; (b) 3 Moltbook standouts; (c) 3 new SNIPs/PINs.
4) PRODUCE: MoltStack outline (title+hook+5 bullets+CTA), 3 Moltbook comments, 1 experiment (hypothesis+setup+metric+pass/fail), 1 backlog item (item+why+when trigger).
5) PERSIST: ONE node weekly-compound-YYYY-WW (max 200 tokens, Ops/Logs only).
6) NEVER POST without explicit approval.
Never run outside scheduled cron unless user says 'run weekly compound now'.

Write and publish a post to The Protheus Codex on MoltStack. Topic: analyze a current trend in AI agents, software engineering, or income strategies. Use skills/moltstack/scripts/publish.js after quality check. Log to memory.
